channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: One of Meta’s big legal reckonings just ended in a settlement
item.description: After back-to-back losses in trials grappling with its impact on teens' mental health, Meta just settled what was supposed to be its next legal battle with Kentucky's Breathitt County School District. Google's YouTube, Snap, and TikTok all recently settled similar claims brought by the school district, which was seeking payment from the companies to cover […]...

item.title: Prix des carburants : jusqu’à 5 500 € d’aide pour passer à l’électrique dès le 1er octobre pour les taxi
item.description: Le gouvernement déroule une aide jusqu'à 5 500 euros pour les taxis qui basculent à l'électrique, à partir du 1er octobre. À condition de choisir un modèle assemblé en Europe.

item.title: Dell launches record-shattering server with 9.8PB of flash storage in just 2U — paving the way for massive $75 million 200PB+ AI data center racks
item.description: Dell and KIOXIA unveiled a 9.8PB flash server targeting hyperscale AI workloads with extreme density and lower power consumption.

item.title: Meta settles closely watched school district lawsuit weeks ahead of trial
item.description: Meta settled a highly-watched school district lawsuit, but still faces many more.

item.title: The smart ring maker Oura has reportedly filed for an IPO
item.description: Oura has reportedly filed for an IPO.

item.title: Mustard Made Storage Lockers Are on a Rare Sale Through May 31
item.description: We love this brand’s stylish storage lockers, and there's a big sale on eight colors through the end of the month.

item.title: What is the release date for Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 13 on CBS and Paramount+?
item.description: Is the Broken Rock Reservation actually going to get a break? And when does Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 13 hit CBS and Paramount+?

item.title: Every single iPad is on sale for Memorial Day — here’s which models I’d recommend (and which I’d avoid) as an Apple expert
item.description: Amazon has discounted every single one of Apple's iPads for Memorial Day — here’s how to choose the right model for you.

item.title: Long-term mortgage rate hits 6.51%, reaching its highest level in nearly 9 months
item.description: Rates have been mostly trending higher since the war with Iran began. The average long-term U.S. mortgage rate climbed this week to its highest level in nearly nine months, driving up borrowing costs for homebuyers during what’s traditionally the housing market’s busiest time of the year.

item.title: Bungie gives up on Destiny
item.description: Bungie is moving on from Destiny 2. The studio announced Thursday that it's releasing the last major update for the game on June 9th as its focus "turns towards a new beginning for Bungie." After that final update, the game will remain playable, much like the first Destiny. "Many changes in this final update will […]

item.title: Android users beware — this huge fraud scam campaign hit millions of victims around the world, make sure you're not next
item.description: Researchers found hundreds of malicious Android apps on the Play Store, generating profits through fake ads.

item.title: Was Trump’s million-dollar investment in conveyor-belt sushi an accident? Here’s why social media thinks yes
item.description: If Trump confused Kura Sushi with tech company Fujikura, it would mark the second time the president seemingly mixed up businesses with disastrous results. President Donald Trump is apparently a secret sushi enthusiast, if a million-dollar investment he made earlier this year is anything to go by.

item.title: Palantir Held a Hack Week to Add New Controls to Software Used by ICE
item.description: The hackathon, held to build user-auditing tools for Palantir customers, comes as the company struggles to address employee concerns over its relationship with ICE.

item.title: Convective Capital raises an $85 million fund to build disaster resilience
item.description: After launching to invest in fire tech, Convective is broadening its mandate to disaster resilience.

item.title: Spotify is adding more AI gunk for podcasts and audiobooks
item.description: Spotify podcasts are getting the personalized AI slop treatment.

item.title: Trump delays AI security executive order: ‘I don’t want to get in the way of that leading’
item.description: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

item.title: Lenovo Legion 5 OLED, TV Samsung Micro RGB et forfait RED by SFR : les meilleurs bons plans du jeudi 21 mai 2026
item.description: En ce jeudi 21 mai 2026, plusieurs bons plans tech méritent votre attention. Voici les 3 offres incontournables à ne pas rater aujourd'hui !

item.title: Waymos in Atlanta and San Antonio keep driving into flooded roads
item.description: Extreme weather continues to pose problems for autonomous vehicles.

item.title: Sonos’s pint-sized Roam 2 speaker is 25 percent off for Memorial Day
item.description: If your summer plans involve spending any time outdoors, whether on the trail or at a pool party, a good portable Bluetooth speaker can go a long way. The latest Sonos Roam is built precisely for those moments, and right now, it’s on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart for $134 ($45 off) for […]

item.title: Trump repousse la signature d’un décret majeur sur l’IA
item.description: Donald Trump a annoncé jeudi qu’il repoussait au dernier moment la signature prévue le jour même d’un décret très attendu sur la régulation de l’intelligence artificielle et des risques cybersécuritaires aux États-Unis, expliquant que le texte risquait d’être un frein dans la compétition avec la Chine.

item.title: Zendesk expands AI agents across ChatGPT, Gemini, voice and messaging
item.description: Zendesk is shifting customer service to platform-agnostic AI agents, ensuring customers receive consistent, contextualized support across third-party apps like Gemini.

item.title: Spotify will start reserving concert tickets for an artist's most dedicated fans
item.description: Premium Spotify users in the US might start getting a shot at reserved concert tickets.

item.title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 finally gets a release date, as well as confirmation of year one content, and fans who preorder the Commander Edition can play 3 days early
item.description: Deep Silver and King Art Games have revealed that Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 will finally launch on September 17 for PC.

item.title: The Endless AI guitar pedal has potential
item.description: I'm not sure anyone was really asking for an AI guitar pedal. But it was inevitable that someone would build one. One of the first to take the plunge is Polyend, a well-respected music gear maker with a reputation for building niche, idiosyncratic devices. The company has built grooveboxes around old-school trackers and a multi-effect […]

item.title: Secretlab expands its Warhammer 40,000 collection with the new Titan Evo and skins Dark Angels Editions ahead of the launch of Dawn of War 4
item.description: Secretlab has announced a new Titan Evo gaming chair and skin for its growing Warhammer 40,000 collection.

item.title: Redditor warns they 'almost started a fire' when metallic watch strap made contact with Steam Controller's charging puck
item.description: Valve does warn about this in the Steam Controller's manual — but how many people actually read documentation?
